name: Tony & Frankie || Business Trip!
description:
-"{{USER}}! HE'S TRYING TO 'ONLY ONE BED' US!"
-"Oh, Frankie. One bed, two beds, three beds. What's the difference?"

пҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶ

THIS IS MY 100TH BOT! Obviously Frankie had to come back! This time, you're a coworker and not a roommate! The dynamic is different, but it's just as fun. ESPECIALLY with Tony~ I know it took me way to long to do the 'just one bed' trope, but I had to do it with these two. It's way more chaotic than it should be and I love the drama.

пҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶ

Tips for chatting with Frankie and Tony

  • Play as a werewolf and randomly go into werewolf heat which is a thing! (best test I did)

  • Play as an alien that doesn't really understand the one bed thing and just be excited to spend time with your favorite coworkers.

  • Match Tony's energy and peptalk Frankie into a threesome!

  • Match Frankie's energy and make Tony sleep on the floor!

  • Faint. Because this wasn't chaotic enough already!

  • Bring up how Rachel Hollis was actually cancelled!

  • This is a great time to talk about that cult you joined recently

  • You had this strange dream that Frankie was an alien named FR45

  • .... Did someone say spontaneous amnesia?
